title: Gearifiers
description: RPG Affixes for all your gear! Find gear with modifiers like Sharp, protective, legendary, useless, and many more. Re-roll modifiers in an altar to try and find ones you like!
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/UTV61dm.png](https://i.imgur.com/UTV61dm.png) Welcome to _Gearifiers_, a mod that adds RPG affixes to all your gear! Crafted Items, items in chests, and mob drops can all come with a random assortment of modifiers! These modifiers can do all sorts of things; from increasing damage or protection, to increasing movement or attack speed, to increasing item durability, even unique effects that only happen when damaged, mining block, killing enemies, or other in-game events. _And also modifiers that provide negative versions of these effects!!_ **Player luck affects modifier rolls!** [![Bisect Hosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp "Bisect Hosting Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs)

## Examples Here are some example tooltips with Gearifier modifiers: Direct damage reduction with the rare Blunting modifier. Stacks on top of all other types of damage modification! ![Blunting Modifier Image](https://i.imgur.com/Ja9HtLr.png) Looting... 2!! A chance to roll mob drop loot tables twice with the Thieving line of modifiers. That rerolls even items that aren't affected by looting like Nether Stars. If you re-roll you might get lucky and get Greater Thieving! ![Thieving Modifier Image](https://i.imgur.com/vVkgLhC.png) Multiple modifiers can appear on one item, and Uh Oh! A negative modifier :(. Is the extra health worth the loss of armor...? hmm. ![Combo Modifier Image](https://i.imgur.com/aPJanNb.png) ## Lots of Modification! There are currently over 70 modifiers to find, with more planned. You won't run out of interesting things to find with that many choices, especially with the ability to re-roll modifiers you don't like. #### Rerolling The Reroll Altar provides an outlet for items you craft or find that have bad modifiers (or _not good enough_ modifiers!). Toss the modified item and a payment item into the Reroll Altar, pay some XP, and you've got some brand new modifiers! This also works on gear that doesn't have any modifiers at all. ![Reroll Altar GUI](https://i.imgur.com/DLb5KlJ.png)
